articles.title: The Healing Awakening: Big Tech's Fake 'Reform' Still Censors Natural Health Information
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's admission that Meta's fact-checking was biased confirms systematic suppression of health freedom information. Despite claims of reform, algorithms continue silencing natural health content while promoting Big Pharma narratives.

articles.title: Fauci and Top Officials Under Fire: The COVID Lies Keep Unraveling
articles.summary: Victor Davis Hanson exposes the mounting evidence of systematic deception by Fauci and health officials during COVID. The question isn't whether they lied, but how many times they deliberately misled the public.

articles.title: Retraction Watch Expert Exposes Media's Love Affair with 'Absurd' Research
articles.summary: Aaron Brown's new book reveals how media systematically promotes legitimate-looking but fundamentally flawed quantitative research. This isn't fraud—it's worse: institutionalized acceptance of scientific nonsense dressed as credible studies.

articles.title: Virta Health CEO: How We Reversed Type 2 Diabetes in 100,000+ People Outside the System
articles.summary: Sami Inkinen reveals how Virta Health successfully treats metabolic disease through methods the medical establishment ignores. Their results with over 100,000 patients expose the failure of conventional diabetes 'management' approaches.

articles.title: ImmunityBio Securities Fraud: Another Biotech Stock Scam Exposed

articles.title: FDA Under Fire as 'Wild West' Peptide Market Exposes Regulatory Capture
articles.summary: The peptide therapy boom creates tension between compounding pharmacies serving patients and commercial drug companies protecting profits. The FDA faces pressure to restrict access to therapies that bypass Big Pharma's stranglehold.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Epidemic: Billions Stolen While Agencies Look the Other Way
articles.summary: Rampant Medicaid fraud in Minnesota and California exposes systematic failure of oversight agencies. Billions in taxpayer funds are diverted while legitimate alternative treatments remain unfunded and suppressed.

articles.title: Meta Pays 'Momfluencers' to Whitewash Child Safety Record Under Scrutiny
articles.summary: Tech Transparency Project exposes Meta's campaign to pay Instagram influencers, including doctors and psychologists, to promote safety features. This manipulation of medical professionals reveals corporate capture of healthcare messaging.

articles.summary: Researchers found that leucine, a nutrient in protein-rich foods, dramatically boosts mitochondrial function by protecting energy-producing proteins. This breakthrough reveals powerful diet-cellular energy connections that threaten pharma's metabolic drug empire.
